note: In-app Calendar! New month-grid view (sidebar → Calendar) showing all jobs, invoice due dates, and recurring runs. Tap a day to see/add jobs. Each job has a Reminder dropdown — Bookkeeper pushes a notification at the exact time you choose (5 min / 1 hour / 1 day before, etc). Requires the push-subscription steps in worker/README.md plus this SQL: alter table profiles add column if not exists push_subscription jsonb; alter table jobs add column if not exists remind_minutes integer; alter table jobs add column if not exists reminded_at timestamptz;
